title: KernelEntry
description: Failure insight record — one entry per failure, extracted before retry. Appended to .aiwg/working/ring/kernels.jsonl

feature.description: What was being built when the failure occurred

approach.description: What was tried — the specific approach that failed

reasoning.description: Why the approach seemed right at the time

kernel.description: What valid insight survives this failure — the preserved content after the container breaks

archetype.description: Failure archetype classification for indexing and retrieval

gate_that_caught.description: Which gate or verification layer detected the failure, if any
